source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for bold operational headings with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual status labels, compact forms, and readable dashboard tables.
layout: 8px operational grid, banded section headers, high-contrast focus rings, compact dashboard panels, calm leaf-litter surfaces, and sharp alert-state hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent Coral Snake motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Coral Snake transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated coral snake motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A coral snake in a clean coiled S-curve with vivid red, yellow, and black warning bands, glossy scales, accurate slender body, small head visible, crisp silhouette edges, and subtle natural texture suitable as a high-contrast alert-system motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full snake body without cropping, readable band sequence, elegant looped pose.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves red bands, yellow rings, black bands, scale detail, and sharp alert contrast.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the snake, no leaves, no pine needles, no ground, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second animal, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Coral Snake" / "Coral Snake Bands", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme. Use coral snake alert red, signal yellow, band black, leaf-litter paper, pine needle green, bark shadow, ochre, and warm cream. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard charts, forms, table, command/search, status, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and tokens. Use crisp red/yellow/black warning bands, quiet leaf-litter neutrals, pine woodland support colors, compact operational dashboard layout, and high-contrast focus states. Exclude random brands, watermarks, generic purple gradients, unrelated saturated colors, illegible token text, and misspellings.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Coral Snake" / "Coral Snake Bands", translated from the light board and the same motif. Keep the high-contrast red/yellow/black coral bands, leaf-litter neutrals adapted into dark surfaces, pine needle support, bark borders, ochre charts, cream foregrounds, and alert-system interaction language. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard charts, forms, table, command/search, status, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and tokens. Preserve yellow focus rings, red destructive and primary actions, black band dividers, readable tables, and compact forms. Exclude random brands, watermarks, neon cyberpunk colors, generic purple gradients, unrelated saturated colors, illegible token text, and misspellings.
